---
name: Spec bug report
about: Report an error or inconsistency in the specification
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Section**
Which section contains the bug? (e.g., §09 line 513)

**Current text**
Paste the current text that contains the error.

**Expected**
What should it say?

**Why**
Why is the current text incorrect?
